content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 5.6.1 / 5.6.3 WARN — RatingGateView.swift routes 4–5 star users to `itms-apps://...write-review` while ≤3 star users are diverted to a private feedback URL (lines ~19–24), plus description.txt says "rate us 5 stars!"
Pierre: Apple's 5.6.1/5.6.3 prohibit manipulating reviews, including review-gating that filters happy users to the App Store while keeping critics off it, and direct `write-review` links that bypass the `SKStoreReviewController`/`requestReview` prompt. You have both a classic star-gate dark pattern and solicitation copy in the description. Replace the custom gate with the system `requestReview` API applied to all users equally, and remove "rate us 5 stars!" from the description.
